# registry

```go
import "github.com/agentstation/starmap/internal/providers/registry"
```

Package registry composes reusable protocol connectors with provider\-specific acquisition.

<a name="DecodeFixture"></a>
## func [DecodeFixture](<https://github.com/agentstation/starmap/blob/main/internal/providers/registry/provider.go#L48>)

```go
func DecodeFixture(source acquisition.Source, payload []byte) ([]catalogs.Model, error)
```

DecodeFixture replays captured response bytes through the selected connector's exact live schema and normalization path without transport or a second parser.

Supports reports whether an endpoint protocol has an executable connector.

<a name="Connector"></a>
## type [Connector](<https://github.com/agentstation/starmap/blob/main/internal/providers/registry/provider.go#L33-L36>)

Connector retrieves model information from a configured provider endpoint.

```go
type Connector interface {
    // ListModels retrieves all available models from the provider.
    ListModels(ctx context.Context) ([]catalogs.Model, error)
}
```

### func [New](<https://github.com/agentstation/starmap/blob/main/internal/providers/registry/provider.go#L85>)

```go
func New(source acquisition.Source) (Connector, error)
```

New selects and configures an outbound connector for one resolved source.

<a name="FetchRawResult"></a>
## type [FetchRawResult](<https://github.com/agentstation/starmap/blob/main/internal/providers/registry/provider.go#L139-L144>)

FetchRawResult contains the result of a raw fetch operation.

```go
type FetchRawResult struct {
    Data       []byte
    StatusCode int
    Header     http.Header
    Latency    time.Duration
}
```

<a name="FetchRaw"></a>
### func [FetchRaw](<https://github.com/agentstation/starmap/blob/main/internal/providers/registry/provider.go#L149>)

```go
func FetchRaw(ctx context.Context, source acquisition.Source) (*FetchRawResult, error)
```

FetchRaw fetches raw response data from a provider's API endpoint. This function is used for fetching raw API responses for testdata generation. Returns a FetchRawResult containing the data, response headers, latency, and URL.
